summary: Iteration 4: Tested NEW auth (JWT), tickets, and reader features end-to-end. Backend 19/19 pytest pass. Frontend: register, login persistence across reload, header avatar with first-letter, /support auth-redirect to /login?next=, ticket creation with auto-support reply, sign-out clearing localStorage, book reader (chapters/pagination/theme/font controls), audiobook player (play/seek/speed selector/tracks), and Order success 'Read' button linking to /read/{order_id}/{product_id} — all PASS.

issues: Header still shows 'Sign in' button when reader is opened — Reader page renders the global Header; might be intentional but feels out-of-place inside an immersive reader UI.

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: bcrypt hash format $2b$ confirmed. JWT secret loaded from .env via os.environ['JWT_SECRET']; raises KeyError if missing — good fail-fast.
server.py:130 get_current_user dep is constructed at import via lambda: db — fine, but consider Depends-injected db for testability.

server.py /api/read endpoint is NOT auth-gated — anyone with order_id+product_id can read. Today there's no enumeration risk because order_ids are UUIDv4, but consider also requiring owner email or a signed token for defense-in-depth.

Reader.jsx uses raw fetch instead of the api axios instance — bypasses any future interceptors (e.g., auth header). Consistent with the no-auth /api/read endpoint but worth aligning if endpoint becomes auth-gated.
auth.jsx: localStorage token is fine for the SPA model, but tokens issued for 7 days with no refresh — acceptable for a demo store, document this for production hardening.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all targeted flows (auth, tickets, reader book + audiobook, order-success Read link, unauth /support redirect)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@streamkart.com / StreamAdmin@2026 (verified login returns role=admin). Random qauser_<rand>@test.com / pass1234 created per test run.
seed_data_creation: Backend seed_admin auto-runs on startup (verified). Test users registered via /api/auth/register; test orders for reader gating created via /api/orders + /api/orders/verify mock.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features (JWT auth, support tickets, /read reader) verified PASS end-to-end. Backend: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_auth_tickets_reader.py — 19/19 green. Frontend: Reader requires a paid order in DB (use /api/orders -> /api/orders/verify with payment_id='pay_*'); then visit /read/{order_id}/{product_id}. Book reader exposes data-testid: book-reader, chapter-title, chapter-body, prev-chapter, next-chapter, theme-paper/sepia/night, font-smaller/larger. Audiobook exposes: audiobook-player, now-playing-title, play-toggle, rewind-15, forward-30, speed-{0.75,1,1.25,1.5,2}, track-{n}. Support: /support pages have subject input, category <select> (order/payment/reader/account/other), message textarea. Header user dropdown shows first-letter avatar; sign-out clears localStorage 'streamkart_token_v1'.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found in iteration 4 scope.
